calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Watts.

Petitioners: Anthony Wong and Shew Loon Wong appeared with Counsel Stella Kang.
Respondent: Stewart Chi Wong was not present.
Agnes Chan Social Worker from Adult Protective Services also served as Cantonese Interperter (not Court certified).

Petitioners as well as Agnes Wong were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court will grant a protective order with respect to Anthony Wong and Shew Loon Wong. Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected persons: Anthony Wong and Shew Loon Wong; 100 yards stay away the home and place of business of the protective Persons.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires February 8, 2017.
